query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS laws_applications (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  position_id INT NOT NULL,
  applicant_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  applicant_email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  applicant_phone VARCHAR(50),
  resume_url TEXT,
  cover_letter TEXT,
  referral_source VARCHAR(100),
  community_connection TEXT,
  skills TEXT,
  experience_years INT,
  status ENUM('submitted', 'screening', 'interview', 'offer', 'hired', 'rejected', 'withdrawn') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'submitted',
  notes TEXT,
  user_id INT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (position_id) REFERENCES laws_positions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

  FOREIGN KEY (position_id) REFERENCES laws_positions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
